violations.text: The presence of large black flies is not controlled as evidenced by live and dead flies throughout the store. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment needs to contact pest control company. Establishment shall clean and sanitize the floor, shelves and front display window. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Wall near rear of store by fire extinguisher was observed to be in poor repair. Wall needs to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
